epigraph.quote: All day, we've gone past lavender fields. Sometimes we've been surrounded by lavender.

per_stop.quote: We paid £25 to sleep on a path.
It was a bit nerve-wracking with terrorism around.
a very good meal, charcuterie, steak/lamb + apple cake
"Oh," said John, "Clairvaux who's she, an au pair."
Suffocatingly hot in the night. No loo paper or toilet seats.
Eve thinks it's 5 star. Charles + John think it's 4. William + Bryony think it's 7.
the top is not snow, it's white limestone
fairy chimney, some over 20ft high, some from natural erosion. The stone on top of a chimney, prevents the top eroding along with the sides.
the campsite (Vallee des Oiseau) that they sent us to, 4km away, was a nudist colony, so we turned the van around
John finally swam because they allowed swimming in shorts.
We got up after tea at 7 + played tennis - Charles' first game!
There was lovely jazz - 12 bar blues - being played across the inlet. We sat on the rocks + listened to it.
